title: d-c-fix Sticky Back Plastic (self Adhesive Vinyl Film) Glossy White 45cm x 2m 346-0011
features: UNMATCHED UPCYCLING WITH GERMAN CRAFTSMANSHIP: Transform ordinary furniture into extraordinary pieces with our premium vinyl wrap! Our sticky back plastic offers sustainable change and creative freedom to refresh your decor in no time. Made in Germany for top precision and quality.
PRACTICAL VERSATILITY FOR EVERY ROOM: From cabinets to kitchen fronts—our vinyl wrap adheres to all smooth surfaces. Add a personal touch to your kitchen, bathroom, office, and more.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN, ROBUST PERFORMANCE: Our sticky back plastic is not only water-resistant and heat-resistant up to 70°C but also easy to apply, cut, and clean—delivering impressive, long-lasting results.

SUSTAINABLE FURNITURE DESIGN WITHOUT COMPROMISE: Revitalize your furniture with style and resourcefulness using our vinyl wrap. Refresh your space without purchasing new furniture—a conscious choice for stylish, eco-friendly decor.

ELEGANT PERSONAL STATEMENTS: Choose from our extensive range of designs, colours, and authentic material looks with our sticky back plastic. Your furniture will make a statement and tell your story—without words.
description: From the manufacturer IDEAS & LOOKS | The d-c-fix Adhesive Films will take your space to the next level | Perfect solution to bring new life to a dated look BACKSPLASH Discover a whole new way to do a Home makeover at a fraction of the cost with the d-c-fix Adhesives. Update a dated look by introducing a splash of colour and style with a new backsplash. Choose from a variety of styles and patterns. GLASS SURFACES Customise a glass surface such as windows, mirrors, table and counter tops even with our Removable And Reusable static cling window films. The d-c-fix collection has a variety of plain, frosted, floral, leaf, stained glass and geometric designs. Our static cling window films provide privacy and reduce glare while still allowing natural sunlight into your room. KITCHEN CUPBOARDS & CABINETS Dated kitchen cupboards and cabinets can be transformed to bring designer looks into your home without the designer * tag. From modern glossy finishes to rich wood grain effects, d-c-fix collections caters to all tastes and styles. About d-c fix Based in Weissbach, Germany, d-c-fix is part of the Konrad Hornschuch AG Group. Our products are all manufactured in Weissbach, Germanywhere we uphold the highest standards of quality and service. As leaders in the vinyl design industry, we are always looking into the * innovations and technologies to improve our products and workflow. Inspired by modern design trends, our large selection interior design products are created with to appeal to all tastes and styles.
